message:
fix: hyphen injection guard, ancestor-set open-file detection, composite index, case-insensitive patterns

- Reject git clone tags starting with hyphen to prevent command injection
  via malicious tag names like "--upload-pack=..." in from_source builds
- Switch scanner_thread_main from collect_open_files() + is_path_open()
  to collect_open_path_ancestors() + is_path_open_by_ancestor() for O(1)
  per-candidate open-file checks instead of O(tree_size) recursive scan
- Add composite index idx_activity_type_time on (event_type, timestamp)
  for faster filtered activity log queries
- Normalize artifact filenames to lowercase before pattern matching so
  classification handles mixed-case filenames consistently

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
